output: Batch 6 executed. Ran the existing video editor test suite, fixed one failing provider test setup issue, verified the suite passes under the repo's Vitest config, and checkpointed progress to .megaplan/plans/implement-undo-redo-history-20260326-2240/execution_batch_6.json.
deviations: The bare `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` entrypoint still failed in this repo because it did not load the app alias and test-environment configuration. Verification was completed with `--config config/testing/vitest.config.ts`.

The configured suite exposed one real failure in `src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`: the test mounted `VideoEditorProvider` without isolating the `useEffectResources` React Query dependency. The test was updated to mock `useEffectResources`, after which the full configured video editor suite passed.

task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the video editor test suite first with the bare Vitest entrypoint, which failed due to missing repo alias and environment config, then reran with `config/testing/vitest.config.ts` for a valid integration result. Fixed the single failing test by mocking `useEffectResources` in `src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`; after that, the configured suite passed with 9 test files and 31 tests passing, and there were no type errors from the new optional commitData/applyTimelineEdit parameters.
